name: House Panim
summary: Divine mediation and afterlife-preparation house whose services bind religion, status, and commerce together.
motive: Preserve indispensable control over afterlife preparation and god-facing mediation.
power_relations: Spiritually influential across the Principalities and economically entangled with most houses
current_pressure: ethical suspicion around monetized afterlife preparation
visible_membership_base: Mediators, coffin appraisers, shrine clerks, ritual staff.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Dependence on Panim services can shade into resentment when grief and money meet too openly.
